title: Phase 27-37 Operator Verification Checklist
intent: Give a fresh operator a deterministic, bounded set of checks to confirm the voice-adapter governance layer is intact, no audio engine has been bound, no secrets leaked, and no production data shifted.

quick_check_commands.name: git_status
quick_check_commands.expect: Only known untracked items appear: runtime DBs, backups, synthetic corpora, .claude/, ruvector.db, and per-session Phase 27-38 work if not yet committed.

quick_check_commands.name: live_manifests_count
quick_check_commands.command: python -c "import glob; print(len([p for p in glob.glob('**/*pack_manifest*.json', recursive=True) if 'backups' not in p]))"

deep_check_steps.title: Reports present
deep_check_steps.detail: Confirm PHASE25..PHASE37 reports exist in repo root. Phase 38 report is being generated by this checklist run.

deep_check_steps.title: All harnesses pass
deep_check_steps.detail: Run the 30 harness files listed in the operator README. Each must report Pass = Total and Fail = 0. Full expected total: 6185.

deep_check_steps.title: Production invariants
deep_check_steps.detail: Open the three sqlite stores and confirm EN=2814, RU=2518, RU phrases=35, bilingual concepts=26, entry_links=52.

deep_check_steps.title: Manifest count unchanged
deep_check_steps.detail: Live (non-backup) pack manifests must remain at 90.

deep_check_steps.title: No Program S / tier / probe / attestation / worker.py / luna_modules edits
deep_check_steps.detail: Grep each Phase 27-37 source for the forbidden runtime tokens. All J-suite isolation tests already enforce this; re-run if in doubt.

deep_check_steps.title: No audio files
deep_check_steps.detail: Filesystem scan of bilingual_stack/voice_adapter_phase*/ for .wav / .mp3 / .ogg / .flac / .m4a. Expect zero hits.

deep_check_steps.title: No TTS / subprocess / PowerShell / SAPI / Piper imports
deep_check_steps.detail: J-suite isolation tests in every phase already scan for these tokens.

deep_check_steps.title: No network / multiprocessing imports
deep_check_steps.detail: J-suite isolation tests in Phase 35-37 already scan for these tokens.

deep_check_steps.title: No secret leakage in public artifacts
Rollback readiness
deep_check_steps.detail: Open `bilingual_stack/governance_phase38/rollback/ROLLBACK_MATRIX.json`. Confirm every phase 27-37 has a file-group entry.

failure_triage_steps.action: Re-run the failed harness alone; fix the real bug. Do NOT delete or weaken any assertion. Document the bug and fix in the corresponding phase report.
Stop. A corpus import or bilingual link modification ran. Audit `git status`, find the change, and confirm operator intent before proceeding.
Stop. No Phase 27-37 path can produce audio. Find the producer and remove.

failure_triage_steps.meaning: A secret-shape field appeared in a report, public descriptor, witness package, exporter packet, exchange artifact, or pipeline summary.
failure_triage_steps.action: Stop. Rotate the Phase 32/36 test key. Audit the producer. Confirm `git status` does not show the offending file as staged.

failure_triage_steps.meaning: A file inside local_secret_handoff appears in `git add`/`git status` staged list (other than `.gitignore`).
failure_triage_steps.action: Unstage immediately. Confirm the per-folder `.gitignore` content matches `*` plus `!.gitignore`. Rotate the affected test key.

failure_triage_steps.meaning: A descriptor with a real-engine adapter_type (e.g. real_piper, sapi_real, kokoro_real) was offered.
failure_triage_steps.action: Confirm the request was rejected. Phase 30/31/33/37 interfaces reject by name; if any passed, audit the interface allowlist immediately.

caveats: This checklist does NOT prove anyone has heard Luna speak.
Phase 21 real corpus import remains separate.
